alerts.title: Iran threatens complete halt to talks after trading strikes with US over Hormuz
alerts.summary: Iran warned of a "complete halt" to nuclear negotiations following reciprocal strikes with US forces in the Strait of Hormuz region (lat 31.97–32.09, lon 52.79–53.1). Multiple CENTCOM-confirmed US airstrikes targeted Iranian missile and drone facilities in response to Iranian attack on commercial vessel. Threat level remains at 9/10 (CRITICAL); Brent crude at $70.61. Sources: incidents (CENTCOM, NBC News, CBS News, New York Times), global_metrics (threat level).

alerts.title: US reverses agreement; now conditions Iranian asset freeze on nuclear progress
alerts.summary: US State Department announced unfreezing of Iranian assets contingent on nuclear advancement, contradicting explicit prior accord that nuclear issues would not be negotiated in current phase. Iran rejected the shift. Enrichment remains at 60% U-235 with 1–2 week breakout window. IAEA access restrictions tightening following recent strikes. Sources: telegram (ME Spectator, ~55K views, nuclear flag), global_metrics (nuclear headlines, IAEA restrictions).

alerts.title: Israeli strikes in Gaza kill 6 Palestinians including cameraman; ceasefire violations continue
alerts.summary: Israeli drone and artillery strikes killed at least 6 Palestinians in Gaza, including Al Jazeera cameraman and 2 children, amid fragile April ceasefire. Multiple incidents reported across central Gaza (lat 31.37–31.67, lon 34.19–34.64). Documented pattern of ongoing ceasefire breaches. Sources: incidents (PBS, Boston Herald, Religion News Service, Al Jazeera).

alerts.title: US expands naval posture; three destroyers, two amphibious ships positioned in Red Sea
alerts.summary: USS Carney, USS Mason, and USS Laboon (destroyers) plus USS Bataan and USS Eisenhower (amphibious/carrier) confirmed deployed in Red Sea (lat ~15.3–15.8, lon ~41.5–41.8) alongside ongoing Houthi escalation. Asset positioning supports Red Sea security amid Iranian proxy activity. Multiple carriers (Abraham Lincoln, Gerald R. Ford) positioned across Arabian Sea and Mediterranean. Sources: assets (live-osint), incidents (naval category reports).

alerts.title: Drone targets US Embassy Green Zone Baghdad; Iraqi Shiite militia escalation suspected
alerts.summary: Drone attack on US Embassy in Baghdad Green Zone reported; attempt made to shoot down with gunfire; impact status unclear. Attributed to Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shiite Militia escalation as proxy activity elevated to "Active" status. Incident occurs amid broader US-Iran strike exchange and rising threat indicators. Sources: telegram (ME Spectator, ~54.7K views, drone flag), global_metrics (Iraqi PMF status: Elevated).

analysis_note: US-Iran direct strikes over Hormuz have escalated to critical intensity (threat 9/10), with Iran threatening to halt nuclear talks and US reversing asset-freeze agreements—creating dual military-diplomatic crisis while proxy forces (Iraqi militias, Houthis) activate simultaneously and Israeli-Palestinian ceasefire fractures under continued strikes.
